description: Fixture: a go.sum where the malicious module github.com/jfrog/go-tools@v0.1.0 (source: vulnerabilities/supply-chain/malicious-packages/go.json) appears ONLY in a /go.mod line — its go.mod was read during minimal-version-selection but its code is NOT compiled into the build (it has no content h1: hash). It must therefore NOT be reported: a vuln in code that is not in the binary is a false positive. Before the parser fix, every /go.mod line was treated as a built dependency and this malicious module was flagged. The actually-built modules (testify, go-spew, yaml.v3) are clean.
